case_title: WU, DONNA VS CITY & COUNTY OF SF(MUNI)

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF HRG SENT TO CITY & COUNTY OF SF(MUNI) RETURNED--NO REASON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY WU, DONNA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF(MUNI) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-29-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WU, DONNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SF(MUNI) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT AGENCY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-29-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-14-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLFT TO BRING PROOF OF DENIAL FROM CCSF.
